raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A brown chip bag and a green chip bag are on a gray table. The bags are flexible and have handles. STRATEGY - First, reach for the green chip bag, grasp its handle to pick it up, then transport it to a new location (the table edge) and place it down. Failure modes include not grasping the handle properly or dropping the bag during transport. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the green chip bag at its body; Step 2 grasp the handle of the green chip bag for secure hold; Step 3 transport the bag to the table edge; Step 4 place the bag on the table edge.**
Goal: on(green_chip_bag, table_edge); stable(green_chip_bag)
Scene: green_chip_bag, brown_chip_bag, table
Step 1: reach(green_chip_bag)
  affordance_region: the body of the green chip bag
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_chip_bag, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_chip_bag) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(green_chip_bag)
  affordance_region: the handle of the green chip bag
  contact: holding(green_chip_bag) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(green_chip_bag)
Step 3: transport(green_chip_bag -> table_edge)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table edge
  spatial: above(green_chip_bag, table_edge, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(green_chip_bag)
  done_when: above(green_chip_bag, table_edge, 0.05)
Step 4: place(green_chip_bag -> table_edge)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table edge
  contact: surface_contact(green_chip_bag, table_edge) [completion]; released(green_chip_bag) [completion]
  pose: stable(green_chip_bag) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(green_chip_bag, table_edge) AND released(green_chip_bag)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the green chip bag
the handle of the green chip bag
an empty area on the table edge
an empty area on the table edge
